state_snapshot.overall_goal: Build a bootable, SSH-enabled Aurora KDE Linux OCI image (Wayland-only) based on BuildStream and successfully deploy it to physical hardware (SanDisk USB).
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - Wayland-only environment (disable X11 features or guard with HAVE_X11). - Use BuildStream 2 for all element definitions. - Inherit architecture patterns from Dakota (Project Bluefin) and Project OsTree. - **FORBIDDEN:** Use of `bootc-image-builder` tool; must use native `bootc` or host-native OSTree orchestration. - Filesystem: Root must be `xfs` (Dakota standard) for reliable metadata mapping.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Initramfs XFS Support:** The `gnomeos` initramfs generator requires explicit inclusion of `fs/xfs` in the `MODULES` array and XFS binaries in the `BINARIES` array to support mounting XFS roots. - **Partition Labels:** The system's `fstab` and `systemd-boot` configuration expect specific labels (e.g., `LABEL=EFI` for the ESP). Discrepancies lead to boot timeouts and emergency mode. - **Justfile Mandate:** Project commands (especially `bst`) MUST be run via the `Justfile` wrapper to ensure the correct containerized environment and reproducible results. - **OSTree Debugging:** Debugging boot issues requires checking the active OSTree deployment directory (`/ostree/deploy/...`) rather than the physical root.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `kde-build-meta-local/files/gnomeos/generate-initramfs/modules/50-kmod/module.sh`: Updated to include `fs/xfs` kernel modules. - `kde-build-meta-local/files/gnomeos/generate-initramfs/modules/50-filesystems/module.sh`: Updated to include XFS binaries (`xfs_repair`, etc.). - `GEMINI.md`: Created to document the `Justfile` usage mandate. - `AGENTS.md`: Updated with the mandatory `Justfile` workflow for all agents. - `/dev/sda2 (ESP)`: Relabeled from `EFI-SYSTEM` to `EFI` using `fatlabel`. - `initramfs.img`: Rebuilt and redeployed with full XFS support.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `/var/home/james/dev/kde-linux/` - Target: `/dev/sda` (SanDisk USB 3.2 Gen1). - Boot State: Reached `graphical.target` and login prompt on `ttyS0`. - Known Issue: `systemd-logind.service` failing to start, potentially blocking user sessions.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Fixed the initramfs hang by adding `xfs.ko` and XFS tools to the build script. - Resolved the `EFI` device timeout by relabeling the ESP partition to match `fstab`. - Established project-wide standards in `GEMINI.md` and `AGENTS.md` for using the `Justfile`. - Verified successful boot to login prompt via serial console.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Resolve Plasma/Qt6 build and linker issues. 2. [DONE] Create functional OSTree-ready OCI image. 3. [DONE] Deploy OS tree to physical USB device. 4. [DONE] Configure bootloader and verify kernel/initrd loading. 5. [DONE] Identify and resolve the initramfs hang after Btrfs module load. 6. [DONE] Successfully reach login prompt and verify graphical target. 7. [TODO] Investigate and fix `systemd-logind.service` failure. 8. [TODO] Refine the automated `bootc install` path for reproducible deployment.
